name: @firegrid/store
description: Fable-native S2-backed durable store adapters for Firegrid.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Store.fsproj -o src/generated --optimize --noCache && mkdir -p src/generated/log/fable_modules && cp -R src/generated/fable_modules/. src/generated/log/fable_modules/
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/store diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/store lint is covered by F# compile'
